# Copilot Instructions for Blind 75 TypeScript Practice

This workspace is designed for practicing the Blind 75 interview questions in TypeScript.

## Project Structure

- Questions are organized by category (arrays, strings, trees, etc.)
- Each question has its own TypeScript file with solution and tests
- Use Jest for testing solutions
- Follow consistent naming conventions

## Coding Guidelines

- Use TypeScript with strict mode
- Write clean, readable code with proper types
- Include comprehensive test cases
- Add time and space complexity comments
- Follow the template structure for consistency

## Testing

- Run tests with `npm test`
- Each solution should have corresponding test cases
- Test edge cases and boundary conditions
